prompt: A chase list: clients with outstanding documents ranked worst-first, and let me send one of them a reminder message without leaving the page.
wire:
export default function ChaseListPanel() { const [clients, setClients] = useState([]); const [deadlines, setDeadlines] = useState([]); const [selected, setSelected] = useState(null); const [message, setMessage] = useState(""); const [phase, setPhase] = useState("idle"); const [sent, setSent] = useState({}); useEffect(() => { Promise.all([ tools.host_listClients({ filter: "missing_docs" }), tools.host_listDeadlines(), ]).then(([cl, dl]) => { const deadlineMap = {}; (dl.data || dl || []).forEach((d) => { deadlineMap[d.id] = d; }); const rows = (cl.data || cl || []).map((c) => { const dl = deadlineMap[c.id] || {}; const missing = c.documentsOutstanding ?? (c.documents ? c.documents.filter(d => d.status === "missing" || d.status === "needs_review").length : 0); const total = c.documentsTotal ?? (c.documents ? c.documents.length : 0); const deadline = c.filingDeadline || dl.filingDeadline || null; const daysLeft = deadline ? Math.ceil((new Date(deadline) - new Date("2026-07-21")) / 86400000) : null; return { ...c, missing, total, deadline, daysLeft }; }).sort((a, b) => { const urgencyA = (a.daysLeft !== null ? a.daysLeft : 9999) - (a.missing * 100); const urgencyB = (b.daysLeft !== null ? b.daysLeft : 9999) - (b.missing * 100); return urgencyA - urgencyB; }); setClients(rows); setDeadlines(dl.data || dl || []); }); }, []); const open = (c) => { setSelected(c); setMessage(""); setPhase("idle"); }; const close = () => { setSelected(null); setPhase("idle"); }; const send = async () => { if (!message.trim() || !selected) return; setPhase("sending"); const result = await tools.host_sendClientMessage({ id: selected.id, body: { body: message, author: "Firm" }, }); setPhase(result && result.status === "pending-approval" ? "awaiting" : "sent"); if (result && result.status !== "pending-approval") { setSent((prev) => ({ ...prev, [selected.id]: true })); } }; const urgencyVariant = (c) => { if (c.daysLeft !== null && c.daysLeft <= 7) return "overdue"; if (c.missing > 0) return "missing"; return "neutral"; }; const daysLabel = (daysLeft) => { if (daysLeft === null) return "—"; if (daysLeft < 0) return `${Math.abs(daysLeft)}d overdue`; if (daysLeft === 0) return "Due today"; if (daysLeft === 1) return "Tomorrow"; if (daysLeft <= 7) return `${daysLeft}d left`; return `${daysLeft}d`; }; const tokens = { bg: "var(--vendo-color-background)", surface: "var(--vendo-color-surface)", text: "var(--vendo-color-text)", muted: "var(--vendo-color-muted)", accent: "var(--vendo-color-accent)", accentText: "var(--vendo-color-accent-text)", danger: "var(--vendo-color-danger)", border: "var(--vendo-color-border)", font: "var(--vendo-font-family)", radiusSm: "var(--vendo-radius-small)", radiusMd: "var(--vendo-radius-medium)", }; return (
